title: Fanservice in NGE I dont see it man
display_title: Fanservice in NGE I dont see it man
wikitext:
[]: Fanservice in NGE? I don't see it, man.             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Sat Aug 05, 2006 9:52 am For people who say nudity, Adam and Eve were nekkid in bible pictures and stuff. Nudity shows someone in a "natural state", if you will.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Aug 05, 2006 9:58 am That's what hentai are for!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Aug 05, 2006 10:38 am Misato's shapely rump filling the screen; camera angles which forget that the girls have heads; Rei emerging from the shower in just a towel; Asuka's pantsu ... nope, no fanservice at all.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Sat Aug 05, 2006 12:21 pm The standards have changed.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sat Aug 05, 2006 12:46 pm Umm ritsuko in the swim suits Asuka in the suim suit Misato boobies bouncing all over what more ya want man ?

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Sat Aug 05, 2006 12:50 pm People said that FS is a cheap way to draw in viewers. Ppl say that NGE has fanservice so I wanted to know where it was.

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Sat Aug 05, 2006 1:03 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Asuka's pantsu

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Sat Aug 05, 2006 3:13 pm What about all of the gratuitous core shots? :P

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Aug 05, 2006 6:04 pm Legend of the Past wrote: Mr. Tines wrote: Asuka's pantsu

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Sat Aug 05, 2006 8:14 pm IT'S ALL OVER THE PLACE. You're just not noticing, because animes that are considered "fan serving" today would be considered soft porn ten years ago.

[]:             Quote Post by narcosis219 » Sat Aug 05, 2006 8:43 pm uh... someone mind telling me what fanservice is?

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Sat Aug 05, 2006 9:20 pm Suggestive angles, redundant shots of too-much-flesh/underwear and stuff like that. Think of how often we get accidental groping, touching and flashing in anime. See a hand, see a tit close by, and rest assured they'll meet up soon enough. Not sure that has a lot to do with pleasing the fans, but it's a stupid fucking joke we all grew sick of in the 1900s, and I'd like to bring it to attention. Just take a look in episode 2 when Misato and Shinji are at the dinnertable, and how when Misato leans over the table she gets a camera right up her asshole.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sat Aug 05, 2006 9:54 pm Also, Shinji is constantly having his ladies' breasts shoved in his face in like, every other episode. As for nudity in Evangelion, it seems to come in three varieties. A) To emphesise humiliation B) To heighten the disturbing aspect of a scene C) Fanservice When you see the tank full of naked Rei clones, that's B. When Ritsuko is naked and being interrogated by SEELE, that's A. When Misato is in the bathtub, that's C. When Asuka is naked and dying in the bathtub, that's A. When Shinji falls ontop of Rei in her apartment, it's C. When Asuka and Misato are at the hotsprings, that's C. I could go on all day... So yes, there is fanservice in Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Aug 06, 2006 2:56 am narcosis219 wrote: uh... someone mind telling me what fanservice is?

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Sun Aug 06, 2006 11:23 am Timstuff wrote: When Shinji falls ontop of Rei in her apartment, it's C.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sun Aug 06, 2006 12:26 pm I agree. Fanservice doesn't have to be a bad thing, and for the most part I think NGE finds a good balance... Although I still feel that Shinji's hand on Rei's naked breast was un-necessary.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Aug 06, 2006 12:48 pm Timstuff wrote: Although I still feel that Shinji's hand on Rei's naked breast was un-necessary.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Sun Aug 06, 2006 3:14 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Timstuff wrote: Although I still feel that Shinji's hand on Rei's naked breast was un-necessary.

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Mon Aug 07, 2006 3:26 am FauÃŸtin wrote: I think that scene with Shinji and Ayanami speaks a lot of their personality: Shinji is clumsy (and horny to be honest... but can't blame him. I'd go mad if I would be sorrouned hot ladies like Asuka, Ayanami, Misato, Ritsuko, et cetera :P ), and Ayanami is so calm, that she can freeze Hell. Both literally and allegoricaly ( ). And I would like to mention that I was DAMN jelaous of Shinji when I saw that particular scene. Shinji tends to get his filthy paws on the best things on Earth. And in this case, I mean that literally.... :P

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Mon Aug 07, 2006 6:29 pm Yeah, whatever!! I'm just happy I watch Evangelion for everything it has...
